symptoms.symptom_name: Flexural itchy scaly weeping plaques with lichenification on an atopic background

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Symmetrical flexural eczematous plaques with atopy are diagnostic of atopic dermatitis.
Scabies favours finger-webs/wrists with burrows, not the flexural atopic pattern.

symptoms.symptom_name: No clustered punched-out monomorphic erosions; afebrile

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of punched-out monomorphic erosions and fever makes eczema herpeticum unlikely.
Absence of honey crust/spread/fever makes overt superinfection unlikely now.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Atopic dermatitis is clinical; no routine tests for a typical flare.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Viral swab/PCR if herpetic features appear
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To confirm eczema herpeticum if punched-out erosions develop.
